articles.title: Multibaggers, mirages and market math
articles.description: An experiment demonstrates how survivorship bias can create the illusion of market genius. By selectively sharing successful predictions and discarding failures, a perfect track record can be manufactured. This bias also influences equity investing, leading investors to chase multi-baggers without considering the underlying conditions that enable such gains.

articles.title: Cancer risk awareness and concrete plans boosted gastric screening during COVID-19
articles.description: A study conducted by researchers at University of Tsukuba revealed that individuals with higher cancer-related health literacy, perceived susceptibility to gastric cancer, and encouragement from family members or health care providers demonstrated stronger intentions to undergo gastric cancer screening, even during the COVID-19 pandemic. These intentions were significantly associated with subsequent screening participation. In contrast, while fear of COVID-19 increased screening intention in the short term, over time it could suppress screening behavior.

articles.title: India’s gold import duty hike: A double-edged sword

articles.description: The Russian leader will go to Beijing on Tuesday for talks with President Xi Jinping. The Kremlin said he had watched President Trump’s visit closely.

articles.title: Elephants eat their crops. Farmers strike back. It's a war that's only getting worse
articles.description: In Sri Lanka, the islanders revere elephants. But for farmers, there's rising tension that's leading to more fatal encounters — for both humans and hungry pachyderms.

articles.title: New Zealand bowl first as weather threatens Cardiff ODI
articles.description: England recall Grewcock and Filer after washout in Northampton

articles.title: FIR filed against TMC's Abhishek over 'inflammatory' remarks during Bengal polls
articles.description: Social activist Rajib Sarkar raised a complaint alleging that the TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee made provocative comments on post-poll violence and the vote counting process

articles.title: Barn swallows in Manipur may have shed migratory trait
articles.description: A new study challenges the understanding of the fork-tailed birds that were believed to be seasonal migrants in the northeastern region from colder northern climates

articles.title: CJI Surya Kant clarifies ‘parasites’ remarks, says ‘pained’ over media reports
articles.description: "It is totally baseless to suggest that I criticised the youth of our nation. Not only am I proud of our present and future human resource, but every youth of India inspires me,”  the CJI said in a statement.

articles.title: 'Misquoted my oral observations': CJI Surya Kant clarifies 'cockroach' remarks on unemployed youth
articles.description: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant clarified his remarks comparing some unemployed youth to 'cockroaches,' stating his comments were misquoted and targeted individuals using fake degrees in professions. He expressed pride in India's youth, calling them pillars of a developed nation, and emphasized his respect for them. The clarification followed controversy over his observations during a court hearing.

articles.title: Watch: Football Focus
articles.description: FA Cup final preview show live from Wembley with Alex Scott ahead of Chelsea v Man City.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu cabinet: 10 ministers allotted portfolios, CM Vijay keeps home, police & public administration
articles.description: The Tamil Nadu Lok Bhavan has announced portfolio allocations for the new cabinet. Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay will lead the government. He has retained key departments. Other ministers have been assigned portfolios including finance, health, and education. This marks a significant administrative development for the new government.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Islamic State group leader was killed in a joint U.S.-Nigerian mission
dailyNews.description: Trump announced the joint operation in Africa's most populous country in a late-night social media post. He said Abu Bakr al-Mainuki was second in command of the Islamic State group globally.

dailyNews.title: Trump says senior IS leader killed by US and Nigerian forces
dailyNews.description: The US president says the joint operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
dailyNews.description: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Islamic State ‘second in command’ killed by US and Nigerian forces
dailyNews.description:
US president calls Abu-Bilal al-Minuki ‘most active terrorist in the world’ and says he was eliminated in ‘very complex mission’
Donald Trump has said US and Nigerian forces killed the “second in command” global leader of the Islamic State.
“Tonight, at my direction, brave American forces and the Armed Forces of Nigeria flawlessly executed a meticulously planned and very complex mission to eliminate the most active terrorist in the world from the battlefield,” the US president said on his Truth Social platform on Friday.
 Continue reading...

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. kills Islamic State leader in Nigeria
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced Friday evening that U.S. and Nigerian military forces had killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, a leader in the Islamic State group.

dailyNews.title: EXCLUSIVE VIDEO: Bishop Barron to address 'true threat to democracy' at Trump prayer event
dailyNews.description: Bishop Barron will address what he calls the marginalization of God at Trump's Rededicate 250 prayer event on the National Mall this Sunday.

dailyNews.title: After Indiana purge, Trump sets sights on Louisiana’s Bill Cassidy
dailyNews.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy fights for political survival in Louisiana's GOP primary as Trump and allies back Rep. Julia Letlow to unseat the incumbent.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, second in command of ISIS globally, killed in US-Nigerian operation
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced U.S. and Nigerian forces eliminated Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, whom he identified as the second in command of ISIS globally.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s flavored vape push sparks backlash from MAHA influencers and federal officials
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s moves to make flavored vapes more widely available have caused a splintering among some in the MAHA movement and some federal health officials.

dailyNews.title: ‘Perfect statement’: Trump defends his dismissal of Americans’ finances amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: The president also said he’s not considering the political implications of the Iran war on the midterms, when Republicans will be defending slim majorities in each chamber.

dailyNews.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
dailyNews.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.
